          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import AsyncIterator\nfrom contextlib import asynccontextmanager\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Annotated, cast\n\nfrom fastapi import Depends, FastAPI, HTTPException, Query, Request, Response, status\nfrom fastapi.responses import ORJSONResponse\nfrom sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom miniq.api.schemas import (\n    EventListResponse,\n    HealthResponse,\n    JobListResponse,\n    JobResponse,\n    SubmitJobRequest,\n    SubmitJobResponse,\n)\nfrom miniq.config import get_settings\nfrom miniq.db.models import Job\nfrom miniq.observability.logging import get_logger\nfrom miniq.observability.metrics import render_metrics, set_queue_depths\nfrom miniq.runtime import Runtime, build_runtime\nfrom miniq.services import JobService\nfrom miniq.tasks.registry import UnknownTaskError\nfrom miniq.utils import decode_cursor\n\n\n@asynccontextmanager\nasync def lifespan(app: FastAPI) -> AsyncIterator[None]:\n    runtime = build_runtime(service=REDACTED\"api\", settings=REDACTED    await runtime.initialize()\n    app.state.runtime = runtime\n    yield\n    await runtime.close()\n\n\napp = FastAPI(\n    title=REDACTED\"Miniq API\",\n    version=REDACTED\"0.1.0\",\n    default_response_class=REDACTED,\n    lifespan=REDACTED,\n)\n\n\ndef get_runtime(request: Request) -> Runtime:\n    return cast(Runtime, request.app.state.runtime)\n\n\ndef get_job_service(runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)]) -> JobService:\n    return JobService(\n        repository=REDACTED,\n        broker=REDACTED,\n        tasks=REDACTED,\n        logger=REDACTED\"miniq.api.jobs\", service=REDACTED\"api\"),\n    )\n\n\ndef _require_job(job: Job | None, job_id: str) -> Job:\n    if job is None:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=REDACTED, detail=REDACTED\"job {job_id} not found\")\n    return job\n\n\ndef _parse_cursor_datetime(value: str | None) -> datetime | None:\n    if value is None:\n        return None\n    return datetime.fromisoformat(value)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs\", response_model=REDACTED, status_code=REDACTED def submit_job(\n    payload: SubmitJobRequest,\n    service: Annotated[JobService, Depends(get_job_service)],\n    runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)],\n) -> SubmitJobResponse:\n    queue = payload.queue or runtime.settings.default_queue\n    try:\n        job = await service.submit_job(\n            job_type=REDACTED,\n            payload=REDACTED,\n            queue=REDACTED,\n            max_attempts=REDACTED,\n            run_at=REDACTED,\n            idempotency_key=REDACTED,\n        )\n    except UnknownTaskError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=REDACTED, detail=REDACTED\"unknown task type: {exc}\"\n        ) from exc\n    return SubmitJobResponse(job_id=REDACTED\"/jobs/{job_id}\", response_model=REDACTED def get_job(\n    job_id: str,\n    runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)],\n) -> JobResponse:\n    job = _require_job(await runtime.repository.get_job(job_id), job_id)\n    return JobResponse.from_orm_job(job)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs/{job_id}/cancel\", response_model=REDACTED def cancel_job(\n    job_id: str,\n    runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)],\n) -> JobResponse:\n    job = _require_job(await runtime.repository.cancel_job(job_id=REDACTED, job_id)\n    if job.state not in {\"QUEUED\", \"RUNNING\", \"CANCELED\"}:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=REDACTED, detail=REDACTED\"job {job_id} cannot be canceled\"\n        )\n    return JobResponse.from_orm_job(job)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs/{job_id}/retry\", response_model=REDACTED def retry_job(\n    job_id: str,\n    service: Annotated[JobService, Depends(get_job_service)],\n) -> JobResponse:\n    job = _require_job(await service.retry_job(job_id=REDACTED, job_id)\n    if job.state not in {\"QUEUED\", \"FAILED\", \"DEAD\"}:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=REDACTED, detail=REDACTED\"job {job_id} cannot be retried\"\n        )\n    return JobResponse.from_orm_job(job)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs\", response_model=REDACTED def list_jobs(\n    runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)],\n    state: str | None = None,\n    type: str | None = Query(default=None, alias=REDACTED\"type\"),\n    limit: int = Query(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED,\n    cursor: str | None = None,\n) -> JobListResponse:\n    cursor_payload = decode_cursor(cursor)\n    jobs = await runtime.repository.list_jobs(\n        state=REDACTED,\n        job_type=REDACTED,\n        limit=REDACTED + 1,\n        cursor_created_at=REDACTED            None if cursor_payload is None else cursor_payload[\"created_at\"]\n        ),\n        cursor_id=None if cursor_payload is None else cursor_payload[\"id\"],\n    )\n    return JobListResponse.from_jobs(jobs, page_limit=REDACTED\"/events\", response_model=REDACTED def list_events(\n    runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)],\n    job_id: str | None = None,\n    cursor: str | None = None,\n    limit: int = Query(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED,\n) -> EventListResponse:\n    after_id = int(cursor or \"0\")\n    events = await runtime.repository.list_events(job_id=REDACTED, after_id=REDACTED, limit=REDACTED    return EventListResponse.from_events(events)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/metrics\")\nasync def metrics(service: Annotated[JobService, Depends(get_job_service)]) -> Response:\n    set_queue_depths(await service.queue_depths())\n    body, content_type = render_metrics()\n    return Response(content=REDACTED, media_type=REDACTED\"/healthz\", response_model=REDACTED def healthz(runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)]) -> HealthResponse:\n    db_ok = False\n    broker_ok = False\n    health_logger = get_logger(\"miniq.api.health\", service=REDACTED\"api\")\n    try:\n        async with runtime.engine.connect() as conn:\n            await conn.execute(text(\"SELECT 1\"))\n        db_ok = True\n    except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\n        health_logger.exception(\"database health check failed\")\n    try:\n        broker_ok = await runtime.broker.ping()\n    except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\n        health_logger.exception(\"broker health check failed\")\n    if not (db_ok and broker_ok):\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=REDACTED,\n            detail=REDACTED, database=REDACTED, broker=REDACTED,\n        )\n    return HealthResponse(ok=True, database=True, broker=REDACTED main() -> None:\n    import uvicorn\n\n    settings = get_settings()\n    uvicorn.run(\n        \"miniq.api.app:app\",\n        host=REDACTED,\n        port=REDACTED,\n        reload=False,\n        factory=False,\n    )\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\n\nfrom miniq.db.models import Job, JobEvent\nfrom miniq.utils import encode_cursor\n\n\nclass SubmitJobRequest(BaseModel):\n    type: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    queue: str = \"default\"\n    max_attempts: int = Field(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    run_at: datetime | None = None\n    idempotency_key: str | None = Field(default=None, max_length=REDACTED SubmitJobResponse(BaseModel):\n    job_id: str\n\n\nclass JobResponse(BaseModel):\n    id: str\n    type: str\n    queue: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    state: str\n    created_at: datetime\n    updated_at: datetime\n    idempotency_key: str | None\n    attempts: int\n    max_attempts: int\n    next_run_at: datetime | None\n    schedule: str | None\n    last_error: str | None\n    result: dict[str, Any] | None\n    cancel_requested: bool\n    broker_enqueued_at: datetime | None\n    last_stream_id: str | None\n    schedule_id: str | None\n    finished_at: datetime | None\n    dlq_published_at: datetime | None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_orm_job(cls, job: Job) -> JobResponse:\n        return cls(\n            id=REDACTED,\n            type=REDACTED,\n            queue=REDACTED,\n            payload=REDACTED,\n            state=REDACTED,\n            created_at=REDACTED,\n            updated_at=REDACTED,\n            idempotency_key=REDACTED,\n            attempts=REDACTED,\n            max_attempts=REDACTED,\n            next_run_at=REDACTED,\n            schedule=REDACTED,\n            last_error=REDACTED,\n            result=REDACTED,\n            cancel_requested=REDACTED,\n            broker_enqueued_at=REDACTED,\n            last_stream_id=REDACTED,\n            schedule_id=REDACTED,\n            finished_at=REDACTED,\n            dlq_published_at=REDACTED,\n        )\n\n\nclass JobListResponse(BaseModel):\n    items: list[JobResponse]\n    next_cursor: str | None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_jobs(cls, jobs: list[Job], *, page_limit: int) -> JobListResponse:\n        next_cursor: str | None = None\n        items = jobs\n        if len(jobs) > page_limit:\n            items = jobs[:page_limit]\n            last = items[-1]\n            next_cursor = encode_cursor(\n                {\n                    \"created_at\": last.created_at.isoformat(),\n                    \"id\": last.id,\n                }\n            )\n        return cls(items=REDACTED for job in items], next_cursor=REDACTED JobEventResponse(BaseModel):\n    id: int\n    job_id: str\n    ts: datetime\n    old_state: str | None\n    new_state: str | None\n    message: str\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] | None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_orm_event(cls, event: JobEvent) -> JobEventResponse:\n        return cls(\n            id=REDACTED,\n            job_id=REDACTED,\n            ts=REDACTED,\n            old_state=REDACTED,\n            new_state=REDACTED,\n            message=REDACTED,\n            metadata=REDACTED,\n        )\n\n\nclass EventListResponse(BaseModel):\n    items: list[JobEventResponse]\n    next_cursor: str | None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_events(cls, events: list[JobEvent]) -> EventListResponse:\n        next_cursor = str(events[-1].id) if events else None\n        return cls(\n            items=REDACTED for event in events],\n            next_cursor=REDACTED,\n        )\n\n\nclass HealthResponse(BaseModel):\n    ok: bool\n    database: bool\n    broker: bool\n"

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, desc, func, or_, select, update\nfrom sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker\n\nfrom miniq.db.models import Job, JobEvent, ScheduleTick\nfrom miniq.db.state_machine import require_transition\nfrom miniq.enums import ACTIVE_STATES, JobState\nfrom miniq.utils import new_job_id, utc_now\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True, frozen=REDACTED JobPage:\n    items: list[Job]\n    next_cursor: str | None\n\n\nclass JobRepository:\n    def __init__(self, session_factory: async_sessionmaker[AsyncSession]) -> None:\n        self._session_factory = session_factory\n\n    async def create_job(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        job_type: str,\n        queue: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        max_attempts: int,\n        next_run_at: datetime,\n        idempotency_key: str | None,\n        schedule_id: str | None = None,\n        schedule: str | None = None,\n        message: str = \"job queued\",\n    ) -> Job:\n        now = utc_now()\n        job = Job(\n            id=REDACTED,\n            type=REDACTED,\n            queue=REDACTED,\n            payload=REDACTED,\n            state=REDACTED,\n            created_at=REDACTED,\n            updated_at=REDACTED,\n            idempotency_key=REDACTED,\n            attempts=REDACTED,\n            max_attempts=REDACTED,\n            next_run_at=REDACTED,\n            schedule_id=REDACTED,\n            schedule=REDACTED,\n        )\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            try:\n                async with session.begin():\n                    session.add(job)\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=None,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED,\n                            event_metadata=REDACTED\"queue\": queue, \"job_type\": job_type},\n                        )\n                    )\n            except IntegrityError:\n                await session.rollback()\n                raise\n            await session.refresh(job)\n            return job\n\n    async def get_job(self, job_id: str) -> Job | None:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            return await session.get(Job, job_id)\n\n    async def get_active_job_by_idempotency_key(self, idempotency_key: str) -> Job | None:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job)\n                .where(\n                    Job.idempotency_key == idempotency_key,\n                    Job.state.in_([state.value for state in ACTIVE_STATES]),\n                )\n                .order_by(desc(Job.created_at))\n                .limit(1)\n            )\n            return (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\n\n    async def list_jobs(\n        self,\n        *,\n        state: str | None,\n        job_type: str | None,\n        limit: int,\n        cursor_created_at: datetime | None,\n        cursor_id: str | None,\n    ) -> list[Job]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = select(Job)\n            if state is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(Job.state == state)\n            if job_type is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(Job.type == job_type)\n            if cursor_created_at is not None and cursor_id is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(\n                    or_(\n                        Job.created_at < cursor_created_at,\n                        and_(Job.created_at == cursor_created_at, Job.id < cursor_id),\n                    )\n                )\n            stmt = stmt.order_by(desc(Job.created_at), desc(Job.id)).limit(limit)\n            return list((await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().all())\n\n    async def list_events(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str | None,\n        after_id: int,\n        limit: int,\n    ) -> list[JobEvent]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = select(JobEvent).where(JobEvent.id > after_id)\n            if job_id is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(JobEvent.job_id == job_id)\n            stmt = stmt.order_by(JobEvent.id.asc()).limit(limit)\n            return list((await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().all())\n\n    async def mark_job_enqueued(self, *, job_id: str, stream_id: str) -> None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                await session.execute(\n                    update(Job)\n                    .where(Job.id == job_id, Job.broker_enqueued_at.is_(None))\n                    .values(broker_enqueued_at=REDACTED, updated_at=REDACTED, last_stream_id=REDACTED                )\n\n    async def get_due_unenqueued_jobs(self, *, now: datetime, limit: int) -> list[Job]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job)\n                .where(\n                    Job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value,\n                    Job.broker_enqueued_at.is_(None),\n                    Job.next_run_at <= now,\n                )\n                .order_by(Job.next_run_at.asc(), Job.created_at.asc())\n                .limit(limit)\n            )\n            return list((await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().all())\n\n    async def count_due_jobs_by_queue(self, *, now: datetime) -> list[tuple[str, int]]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job.queue, func.count(Job.id))\n                .where(\n                    Job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value,\n                    Job.next_run_at <= now,\n                )\n                .group_by(Job.queue)\n            )\n            rows = (await session.execute(stmt)).all()\n            return [(queue, count) for queue, count in rows]\n\n    async def claim_for_execution(\n        self, *, job_id: str, stream_id: str, consumer: str\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                claimed_job_id = (\n                    await session.execute(\n                        update(Job)\n                        .where(Job.id == job_id, Job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value)\n                        .values(\n                            state=REDACTED,\n                            attempts=REDACTED + 1,\n                            updated_at=REDACTED,\n                            last_stream_id=REDACTED,\n                        )\n                        .returning(Job.id)\n                    )\n                ).scalar_one_or_none()\n                if claimed_job_id is None:\n                    return None\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job started\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED                            \"consumer\": consumer,\n                            \"stream_id\": stream_id,\n                            \"attempt\": job.attempts,\n                        },\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def complete_job(self, *, job_id: str, result_payload: dict[str, Any]) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.SUCCEEDED)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.SUCCEEDED.value\n                job.result = result_payload\n                job.last_error = None\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = now\n                job.cancel_requested = False\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job succeeded\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED\"result\": result_payload},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def fail_and_requeue(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        error_message: str,\n        next_run_at: datetime,\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None or job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.FAILED)\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job failed\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED\"error\": error_message, \"attempt\": job.attempts},\n                    )\n                )\n                require_transition(JobState.FAILED, JobState.QUEUED)\n                job.state = JobState.QUEUED.value\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.next_run_at = next_run_at\n                job.last_error = error_message\n                job.result = None\n                job.broker_enqueued_at = None\n                job.last_stream_id = None\n                job.finished_at = None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job requeued\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED\"next_run_at\": next_run_at.isoformat()},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def mark_dead(self, *, job_id: str, error_message: str) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.DEAD)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.DEAD.value\n                job.last_error = error_message\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = now\n                job.broker_enqueued_at = None\n                job.last_stream_id = None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job exhausted retries\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED\"error\": error_message, \"attempt\": job.attempts},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def mark_running_canceled(self, *, job_id: str, message: str) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.CANCELED)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.CANCELED.value\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = now\n                job.cancel_requested = True\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED,\n                        event_metadata=None,\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def cancel_job(self, *, job_id: str) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value:\n                    require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.CANCELED)\n                    old_state = job.state\n                    job.state = JobState.CANCELED.value\n                    job.updated_at = now\n                    job.finished_at = now\n                    job.cancel_requested = True\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=REDACTED,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED\"job canceled before execution\",\n                            event_metadata=None,\n                        )\n                    )\n                    return job\n                if job.state == JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    job.cancel_requested = True\n                    job.updated_at = now\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=REDACTED,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED\"cancel requested\",\n                            event_metadata=None,\n                        )\n                    )\n                    return job\n                return job\n\n    async def retry_job(self, *, job_id: str, next_run_at: datetime) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state not in {JobState.FAILED.value, JobState.DEAD.value}:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.QUEUED)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.QUEUED.value\n                job.attempts = 0\n                job.next_run_at = next_run_at\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = None\n                job.cancel_requested = False\n                job.result = None\n                job.last_error = None\n                job.broker_enqueued_at = None\n                job.last_stream_id = None\n                job.dlq_published_at = None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"manual retry queued\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED\"next_run_at\": next_run_at.isoformat()},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def is_cancel_requested(self, *, job_id: str) -> bool:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = select(Job.cancel_requested).where(Job.id == job_id)\n            value = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\n            return bool(value)\n\n    async def mark_dlq_published(self, *, job_id: str) -> None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                await session.execute(\n                    update(Job)\n                    .where(Job.id == job_id, Job.dlq_published_at.is_(None))\n                    .values(dlq_published_at=REDACTED, updated_at=REDACTED                )\n\n    async def get_last_schedule_tick(self, *, schedule_id: str) -> datetime | None:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(ScheduleTick.planned_time)\n                .where(ScheduleTick.schedule_id == schedule_id)\n                .order_by(ScheduleTick.planned_time.desc())\n                .limit(1)\n            )\n            return (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\n\n    async def create_schedule_job(\n        self,\n        *,\n        schedule_id: str,\n        schedule: str,\n        planned_time: datetime,\n        queue: str,\n        job_type: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        max_attempts: int,\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        job = Job(\n            id=REDACTED,\n            type=REDACTED,\n            queue=REDACTED,\n            payload=REDACTED,\n            state=REDACTED,\n            created_at=REDACTED,\n            updated_at=REDACTED,\n            idempotency_key=None,\n            attempts=REDACTED,\n            max_attempts=REDACTED,\n            next_run_at=REDACTED,\n            schedule_id=REDACTED,\n            schedule=REDACTED,\n        )\n        tick = ScheduleTick(schedule_id=REDACTED, planned_time=REDACTED, job_id=REDACTED        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            try:\n                async with session.begin():\n                    session.add(tick)\n                    session.add(job)\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=None,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED\"recurring job queued\",\n                            event_metadata=REDACTED                                \"schedule_id\": schedule_id,\n                                \"planned_time\": planned_time.isoformat(),\n                            },\n                        )\n                    )\n            except IntegrityError:\n                await session.rollback()\n                return None\n            await session.refresh(job)\n            return job\n"
        },

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import event, text\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import (\n    AsyncEngine,\n    AsyncSession,\n    async_sessionmaker,\n    create_async_engine,\n)\n\nfrom miniq.db.models import Base\n\n\ndef create_engine(database_url: str) -> AsyncEngine:\n    engine = create_async_engine(database_url, future=True, pool_pre_ping=REDACTED    @event.listens_for(engine.sync_engine, \"connect\")\n    def _set_sqlite_pragmas(dbapi_connection: Any, _connection_record: object) -> None:\n        cursor = dbapi_connection.cursor()\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA journal_mode=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA synchronous=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA foreign_keys=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA busy_timeout=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.close()\n\n    return engine\n\n\ndef create_session_factory(engine: AsyncEngine) -> async_sessionmaker[AsyncSession]:\n    return async_sessionmaker(engine, expire_on_commit=False, autoflush=REDACTED def init_db(engine: AsyncEngine) -> None:\n    async with engine.begin() as conn:\n        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)\n        await conn.execute(text(\"PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);\"))\n\n\nasync def ensure_db_parent(path: Path) -> None:\n    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=REDACTED"

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import (\n    JSON,\n    Boolean,\n    DateTime,\n    ForeignKey,\n    Index,\n    Integer,\n    String,\n    Text,\n    UniqueConstraint,\n    text,\n)\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom miniq.enums import JobState\nfrom miniq.utils import utc_now\n\n\nclass Base(DeclarativeBase):\n    pass\n\n\nclass Job(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\n    __table_args__ = (\n        Index(\n            \"ix_jobs_idempotency_active\",\n            \"idempotency_key\",\n            unique=True,\n            sqlite_where=REDACTED\"idempotency_key IS NOT NULL AND state IN ('QUEUED','RUNNING')\"),\n        ),\n    )\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=REDACTED    type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    payload: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=REDACTED    state: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(16), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    )\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    )\n    idempotency_key: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=REDACTED    attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    next_run_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=True, index=REDACTED    )\n    schedule: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=REDACTED    last_error: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=REDACTED    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=REDACTED    cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=REDACTED    broker_enqueued_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=True, index=REDACTED    )\n    last_stream_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=REDACTED    schedule_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True, index=REDACTED    finished_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    dlq_published_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    )\n\n    events: Mapped[list[JobEvent]] = relationship(\n        back_populates=REDACTED\"job\", cascade=REDACTED\"all, delete-orphan\"\n    )\n\n\nclass JobEvent(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=REDACTED    job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(ForeignKey(\"jobs.id\", ondelete=REDACTED\"CASCADE\"), index=REDACTED    ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=False, index=REDACTED    )\n    old_state: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(16), nullable=REDACTED    new_state: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(16), nullable=REDACTED    message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=REDACTED    event_metadata: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(\"metadata\", JSON, nullable=REDACTED    job: Mapped[Job] = relationship(back_populates=REDACTED\"events\")\n\n\nclass ScheduleTick(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\n    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=REDACTED\"uq_schedule_tick\"),)\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=REDACTED    schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=False, index=REDACTED    )\n    job_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), ForeignKey(\"jobs.id\", ondelete=REDACTED\"SET NULL\"), nullable=REDACTED    )\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    )\n\n\nALLOWED_TRANSITIONS: dict[JobState, set[JobState]] = {\n    JobState.QUEUED: {JobState.RUNNING, JobState.CANCELED},\n    JobState.RUNNING: {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.FAILED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD},\n    JobState.FAILED: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.DEAD: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED: set(),\n    JobState.CANCELED: set(),\n}\n"

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import Awaitable, Callable\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any, cast\n\nfrom redis.asyncio import Redis\n\nfrom miniq.observability.metrics import jobs_enqueued_total\nfrom miniq.utils import utc_now\n\n\ndef stream_name(queue: str) -> str:\n    return f\"jobs:{queue}\"\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True, frozen=REDACTED StreamMessage:\n    queue: str\n    stream: str\n    stream_id: str\n    values: dict[str, str]\n\n\nclass RedisBroker:\n    def __init__(self, redis_client: Redis[Any], *, group_name: str) -> None:\n        self._redis = redis_client\n        self._group_name = group_name\n\n    async def ping(self) -> bool:\n        return bool(await self._redis.ping())\n\n    async def ensure_group(self, queue: str) -> None:\n        name = stream_name(queue)\n        try:\n            await self._redis.xgroup_create(\n                name=REDACTED, groupname=REDACTED, id=REDACTED\"0\", mkstream=REDACTED            )\n        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001\n            if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\n                raise\n\n    async def enqueue(\n        self,\n        *,\n        queue: str,\n        job_id: str,\n        job_type: str,\n        enqueued_at: datetime | None = None,\n    ) -> str:\n        timestamp = (enqueued_at or utc_now()).isoformat()\n        message_id = await self._redis.xadd(\n            stream_name(queue),\n            {\n                \"job_id\": job_id,\n                \"queue\": queue,\n                \"type\": job_type,\n                \"enqueued_at\": timestamp,\n            },\n        )\n        jobs_enqueued_total.labels(type=REDACTED, queue=REDACTED        return cast(str, message_id)\n\n    async def publish_dlq(self, *, job_id: str, queue: str, job_type: str, reason: str) -> str:\n        return cast(\n            str,\n            await self._redis.xadd(\n                \"jobs:dlq\",\n                {\n                    \"job_id\": job_id,\n                    \"queue\": queue,\n                    \"type\": job_type,\n                    \"reason\": reason,\n                    \"published_at\": utc_now().isoformat(),\n                },\n            ),\n        )\n\n    async def read_group(\n        self,\n        *,\n        queues: list[str],\n        consumer_name: str,\n        count: int,\n        block_ms: int,\n    ) -> list[StreamMessage]:\n        streams = {stream_name(queue): \">\" for queue in queues}\n        response = await self._redis.xreadgroup(\n            groupname=REDACTED,\n            consumername=REDACTED,\n            streams=REDACTED,\n            count=REDACTED,\n            block=REDACTED,\n        )\n        return self._normalize_messages(response)\n\n    async def reclaim(\n        self,\n        *,\n        queues: list[str],\n        consumer_name: str,\n        min_idle_time_ms: int,\n        count: int,\n    ) -> list[StreamMessage]:\n        reclaimed: list[StreamMessage] = []\n        for queue in queues:\n            name = stream_name(queue)\n            try:\n                response = await self._redis.xautoclaim(\n                    name=REDACTED,\n                    groupname=REDACTED,\n                    consumername=REDACTED,\n                    min_idle_time=REDACTED,\n                    start_id=REDACTED\"0-0\",\n                    count=REDACTED,\n                )\n            except TypeError:\n                pending = await self._redis.xpending_range(\n                    name,\n                    self._group_name,\n                    \"-\",\n                    \"+\",\n                    count,\n                    consumername=None,\n                )\n                ids = [item[\"message_id\"] for item in pending if item[\"idle\"] >= min_idle_time_ms]\n                if not ids:\n                    continue\n                claimed = await self._redis.xclaim(  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call]\n                    name,\n                    self._group_name,\n                    consumer_name,\n                    min_idle_time_ms,\n                    ids,\n                )\n                reclaimed.extend(\n                    self._normalize_messages(\n                        [\n                            (\n                                name,\n                                claimed,\n                            )\n                        ]\n                    )\n                )\n                continue\n            if isinstance(response, (tuple, list)) and len(response) >= 2:\n                messages = response[1]\n                reclaimed.extend(self._normalize_messages([(name, messages)]))\n        return reclaimed\n\n    async def ack(self, *, queue: str, stream_id: str) -> int:\n        return int(\n            await self._redis.xack(  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call]\n                stream_name(queue), self._group_name, stream_id\n            )\n        )\n\n    async def close(self) -> None:\n        close_method = cast(Callable[..., Awaitable[None]], self._redis.close)\n        await close_method()\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _normalize_messages(response: Any) -> list[StreamMessage]:\n        normalized: list[StreamMessage] = []\n        for raw_stream, entries in response or []:\n            stream = raw_stream.decode() if isinstance(raw_stream, bytes) else raw_stream\n            queue = stream.split(\":\", 1)[1]\n            for raw_id, raw_values in entries:\n                stream_id = raw_id.decode() if isinstance(raw_id, bytes) else raw_id\n                values: dict[str, str] = {}\n                for key, value in raw_values.items():\n                    parsed_key = key.decode() if isinstance(key, bytes) else str(key)\n                    parsed_value = value.decode() if isinstance(value, bytes) else str(value)\n                    values[parsed_key] = parsed_value\n                normalized.append(\n                    StreamMessage(\n                        queue=REDACTED,\n                        stream=REDACTED,\n                        stream_id=REDACTED,\n                        values=REDACTED,\n                    )\n                )\n        return normalized\n"
        },

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nfrom collections.abc import Awaitable, Callable\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel\n\nfrom miniq.retry import RetryPolicy\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=REDACTED TaskContext:\n    job_id: str\n    job_type: str\n    queue: str\n    attempt: int\n    logger: Any\n    is_cancel_requested: Callable[[], Awaitable[bool]]\n\n    async def sleep(self, seconds: float) -> None:\n        await asyncio.sleep(seconds)\n\n\nTaskHandler = Callable[[Any, TaskContext], Awaitable[dict[str, Any]]]\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=REDACTED TaskDefinition:\n    name: str\n    payload_model: type[BaseModel]\n    handler: TaskHandler\n    retry_policy: RetryPolicy\n"

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, ValidationError\n\nfrom miniq.tasks.base import TaskContext, TaskDefinition\n\n\nclass UnknownTaskError(KeyError):\n    pass\n\n\nclass TaskRegistry:\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._definitions: dict[str, TaskDefinition] = {}\n\n    def register(self, definition: TaskDefinition) -> None:\n        self._definitions[definition.name] = definition\n\n    def get(self, name: str) -> TaskDefinition:\n        try:\n            return self._definitions[name]\n        except KeyError as exc:\n            raise UnknownTaskError(name) from exc\n\n    def validate_payload(self, name: str, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> BaseModel:\n        definition = self.get(name)\n        try:\n            return definition.payload_model.model_validate(payload)\n        except ValidationError:\n            raise\n\n    @property\n    def names(self) -> set[str]:\n        return set(self._definitions.keys())\n\n    async def run(self, name: str, payload: dict[str, Any], context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        definition = self.get(name)\n        validated = definition.payload_model.model_validate(payload)\n        return await definition.handler(validated, context)\n"
        },
